title: chrysodium alienum
intro: Chrysodium alienum, also known as the golden weed, is a rare and exotic plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Chrysodium alienum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and boost the immune system. Chrysodium alienum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
intro_study: According to "Evidence-based complementary and alternative medicine : eCAM", chrysodium alienum (also known as Stevia aristata) benefits include exerting a marked effect in reducing the viability of protoscoleces of E. granulosus, causing a significant decrease in cyst weight and a high protoscolicidal effect.
